pass_fail_matrix.detail: Scheduled drain call ids matched FunctionCall.get results, call graphs, service metadata, and app-log excerpts.
Each cutover shows old A as active pre-cutover, draining in immediate post snapshot, and terminated in final post snapshot.
Both terminated services recorded drain_timeout_reached=false and inflight_at_termination.total=0.
Immediate post snapshots show rollback_target_* on the active pointer; final snapshots show those fields cleared after drain completion.
Public Cloudflare Worker deployment is absent from the authenticated account, so first public Worker /query could not be executed.
query_stream, queue, and state checks passed through local wrangler dev wired to the deployed Modal base; public worker variant remains blocked with criterion 6.
/service_info and /pool/status raw outputs showed no sandbox_session_secret or synthetic session secret leakage.
All required local regression suites and edge checks passed.
